name: Freedom of Movement
material: a leather strap bound around the arm or a similar appendage
description: You touch a willing creature. For the duration, the target's movement is unaffected by Difficult Terrain, and spells and other magical effects can neither reduce the target's Speed nor cause the target to have the Paralyzed or Restrained condition. The target can also spend 5 feet of movement to automatically escape from nonmagical restraints, such as manacles or a creature that has it Grappled.
